text.title: Video Gen Tools — Procedure
text.summary: 8-step procedure for VideoGenerationService.generate(): route → dispatch → poll → stream-download → ffprobe → archive → fallback → audit log.

step.name: route-provider
step.action: Walk `content/06-decision-tree.xml`. Pick primary_provider; build fallback_chain ordered by recent success rate; exclude providers in cooldown.

step.name: dispatch
step.action: Call provider adapter (RunwayVideoGenerator / LumaVideoGenerator / ReplicateVideoGenerator). Append `{provider, task_id, status: "submitted"}` to providers_tried.

step.name: poll
step.action: Provider-specific status loop. Sleep 5s between checks. Cap at timeout_s. On FAILED with terse error → call analyze-policy-failure to judge retryable vs policy violation.
step.decision-gate: FAILED + policy_violation suspected → skip retries, jump to step 7 fallback.

step.name: stream-download
step.action: `requests.get(url, stream=True)` writing in 1 MB chunks to `{output_dir}/{prompt_hash}.mp4`. Apply rule r2-streaming-download.

step.name: ffprobe-validate
step.action: Run ffprobe; require duration > 0, >= 1 video stream, size > 100 KB. On failure → mark this provider attempt as failed and jump to step 7 fallback.

step.name: archive
step.action: Upload to permanent bucket; emit metadata record (prompt_hash, provider, model_hash, seed, duration, archive ts). Set archived_path.
step.output: archived_path (s3://... or gs://...) attached to result.

step.name: fallback-on-failure
step.action: Pop next provider from fallback_chain; re-execute steps 2-5. Append every attempt to providers_tried. Stop when chain empty or retries_budget exhausted.

step.name: audit-log
step.action: Persist a JSON line to the audit log: `{prompt, prompt_hash, providers_tried, retries, total_ms, status, local_path, archived_path}`. Update provider health state (success / failure counters).
step.output: audit log entry; updated provider health state.
